data.title: Will S&P 500 Open Up Or Down On Wednesday? Potential Iran Deal Talks And Bank Earnings On Deck
data.description: The S&P 500 rose by 1.18% on Tuesday, closing at 6,967.38 as oil prices decreased and optimism grew about a potential U.S.-Iran agreement. The Polymarket crowd is divided on Wednesday's market direction, with 51% predicting an upward movement. The index is currently less than 1% away from its record high of 7,002.28 in January, reflecting a strong recovery from the Iran war-related turmoil. Investors have shown confidence in potential diplomatic progress, with President Donald Trump suggesting Tehran's willingness to negotiate. Talks about a second meeting are in progress.

data.title: Janet Yellen Keeps Fed Cut Hopes Alive As Iran War Roils Markets— 'If I Had To Write One Thing Down...'
data.description: During the HSBC Global Investment Summit in Hong Kong, former U.S. Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen suggested the possibility of one Federal Reserve rate cut later this year amidst concerns raised by the Iran conflict causing an oil-driven inflation surge. Yellen emphasized that the Fed is keeping an open mind despite the heightened near-term inflation outlook. She stated that her inclination would be towards a potential rate cut in the upcoming months. Yellen also highlighted the widespread impact of the over six-week Iran conflict, labeling it as a significant global supply shock affecting various sectors including gasoline, LNG, fertilizers, food, and shipping costs.

data.title: trivago N.V.'s First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release Scheduled for May 5, 2026; Webcast Scheduled for May 6, 2026
data.description: trivago N.V., a company listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol TRVG, is set to announce its first quarter financial results for the period ending March 31, 2026 on May 5, 2026, after the market closes. The webcast by trivago N.V.'s management discussing these results will take place on May 6, 2026, starting at 2:15 PM. The event is scheduled to be held in Düsseldorf, Germany. For more information, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Why Did NN Inc (NNBR) Stock Jump Nearly 16% In Pre-Market Trading?
data.description: NN, Inc. (NASDAQ: NNBR) saw a 15.9% surge in its shares to $1.82 during pre-market trading as the precision manufacturer, headquartered in North Carolina, anticipates first-quarter net sales to show growth compared to last year and company projections. The company also raised its full-year new business outlook, with approximately $43 million in new awards secured in the first quarter at peak annual sales. The focus is on electric grid and data center markets, the company's second-largest end markets. In the initial three months, NN initiated over 60 new programs, resulting in a backlog exceeding production capacity due to high orders. CEO Harold Bevis noted NN's sales are increasing as anticipated, aligning with the upper end of the previous guidance. Visit Benzinga.com for the complete story.

data.title: Valmet reschedules its Interim Review January - March 2026 results webcast
data.description: Valmet Oyj announced on April 15, 2026 at 11:00 a.m. EEST in ESPOO, Finland, that the results webcast for the Interim Review of January – March 2026 has been rescheduled to 11:00 a.m. EEST. This change was made from the initially scheduled time of 10:00 a.m. EEST.

data.title: SOLUM Receives Two Red Dot Product Design Awards for Shelf-Edge and In-Store Communication Solutions
data.description: SOLUM, based in Seoul, South Korea, was recently honored with the prestigious Red Dot Product Design Awards for two of its products. The Newton Core+ and Newton 32” were specifically recognized for their exceptional usability and sustainable retail design. The award highlights the company’s commitment to innovation and quality in product development. SOLUM’s achievement demonstrates its dedication to creating cutting-edge products that meet the highest industry standards.

data.title: BARN'S HONOURED WITH MULTIPLE ACCOLADES AT THE GLOBAL BRAND AWARDS 2025
data.description: In a recent event held by Global Brands Magazine (GBM), barn's, the top coffee chain in Saudi Arabia, was lauded with several esteemed accolades at the Global Brand Awards 2025. The brand clinched the titles of Most Trusted Coffee Brand at the ceremony.
